title: Paphia brassii
taxonomy: Paphia brassii is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Paphiopedilum. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a terrestrial orchid. The plant is native to the island of New Guinea and is characterized by its unique flowers. Paphia brassii is also known as Paphiopedilum brassii and is often grown in greenhouses due to its sensitive nature. It is considered a rare and exotic species within the orchid family.
